title: Demise
description:
A Replica of the Hermitcraft X game "Demise"!

Original by Drbracewell
body:
A Replica of the Hermitcraft X game **"Demise"**!

 A Hardcore-like game, where when you die you become a Reaper. A Reaper's goal is to kill another player. How? - Its up to you to decide!

FAQ
- Q:I got a kill as a reaper, but I didnt get cured
- A: run /trigger reaperkillcure

- Q:How do I start/restart the game?
- A: an operator should run /function demise:startup

 Original by [drbracewell](https://brace.dev/)
